title: The Download: Musk and Altman's legal showdown, and AI’s profit problem | MIT Technology Review
description: Plus: OpenAI has ended its exclusive partnership with Microsoft.

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future | MIT Technology Review
description: Elon Musk says he’s suing to save the company’s mission. The case could have huge consequences for OpenAI and the AI race.

title: The missing step between hype and profit | MIT Technology Review
description: Coding aside, even the best AI systems struggle to be economically viable in the workplace. What happens then?

title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI | MIT Technology Review
description: Enterprise AI hinges on high-accuracy outputs, requiring better data context, unified architectures, and rigorous measurement frameworks, says Bavesh Patel, senior vice president at Databricks, and Rajan Padmanabhan, unit technology officer at Infosys.

title: The Download: DeepSeek’s latest AI breakthrough, and the race to build world models | MIT Technology Review
description: Plus: China has blocked Meta’s $2 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus.

title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters | MIT Technology Review
description: The long-awaited V4 is more efficient and a win for Chinese chipmakers.

title: The Download: supercharged scams and studying AI healthcare | MIT Technology Review
description: Plus: DeepSeek has unveiled its long-awaited new AI model.

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients. | MIT Technology Review
description: The tools may be accurate, but that doesn’t necessarily mean they’ll improve health outcomes.

title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue | MIT Technology Review
description: Plus: Trump signaled he’s open to reversing the Anthropic ban.

title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it. | MIT Technology Review
description: New research suggests that cost declines could be slow for the technology.
